nodes.label: AI use for quick, bounded tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI ineffectiveness for high-coupling, complex, novel tasks
nodes.grounding_span: The more of these factors are present in your prompt the more likely it is that the AI's code will contain mistakes

nodes.label: AI as code generation assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as detrimental for core algorithm development
nodes.grounding_span: using it to write the more one-off and sometimes repetitive code used for data analysis/visualization and hyperparameter tuning was a safe bet for saving time and effort

nodes.label: AI as debugging assistant
nodes.label_negative: Current AI inability to handle large integrated codebases
nodes.grounding_span: Debugging and or understanding large (and especially highly integrated) codebases

nodes.label: Thorough verification of AI outputs
nodes.label_negative: Unverified AI outputs leading to errors
nodes.grounding_span: Scanning over the AI's code, the results of running the code on our dataset, and running a couple of simpler proof of concept inputs

nodes.label: Research efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: The first phase of the project was given a relatively small timeframe

nodes.label: Algorithm correctness and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: the more likely it is that the AI's code will contain mistakes

nodes.label: Cognitive load reduction in complex codebases
nodes.grounding_span: de-load some of the research, memory, and mental organization required to work on these codebases

nodes.label: Pragmatic openness to expanding AI use
nodes.grounding_span: The AI was very effective in helping us in this way

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI for technical design
nodes.grounding_span: I felt that trying to use AI for any of the main algorithm code would likely be detrimental

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI handling entire features in legacy code
nodes.grounding_span: if they could de-load some of the research, memory, and mental organization required to work on these codebases, they could be immensely helpful

nodes.label: Heuristic-based decision framework for AI use
nodes.grounding_span: Given these heuristics, I felt that trying to use AI for any of the main algorithm code would likely be detrimental

nodes.label: Iterative problem-solving — start simple, escalate if needed
nodes.grounding_span: It was more-so an iterative process of drawing diagrams on paper/whiteboard, discussions, and then writing small pieces of code
